title: Fightsaber: Jedi Lightsaber Combat
content:
{{Top|rwm|leg|ref}} {{MagazineArticle |image=[[File:Fightsaber_Jedi_Lightsaber_Combat.png]] |title="Fightsaber:
Jedi Lightsaber Combat" |author=[[David West Reynolds (real person)|David West Reynolds]] |illustrator= |editor= |publisher= |release date=[[October 1]], [[2002]]{{SWArchive|url=community/fanclub/mag/news20020911.html|text=Jedi Fighting and More in ''Insider'' #62}} |pages= |published in=[[Star Wars Insider 62|''Star Wars Insider'' 62]] |reprinted in= }} "'''Fightsaber: Jedi Lightsaber Combat'''" is a 9-page reference article appearing in [[Star Wars Insider 62|''Star Wars Insider'' 62]]. It was written by Dr. [[David West Reynolds (real person)|David West Reynolds]], with the help of fencer and film choreography consultant Jack "Stelen" Bobo. The article introduced the seven forms of [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|lightsaber combat]] into the Star Wars Universe, which has since undergone extraordinary expansion. {{Magazine-stub|article}} ==Contents== *'''Introduction''' *'''The Seven Forms''' **[[Form I/Legends|Form I]] **[[Form II/Legends|Form II]] **[[Form III/Legends|Form III]] **[[Form IV/Legends|Form IV]] **[[Form V/Legends|Form V]] **[[Form VI/Legends|Form VI]] **[[Form VII/Legends|Form VII]] *'''The Marks of Contact''' **''[[Sun djem/Legends|Sun djem]]'' **''[[Shiim/Legends|Shiim]]'' **''[[Shiak]]'' **''[[Cho mai/Legends|Cho mai]]'' **''[[Cho sun/Legends|Cho sun]]'' **''[[Cho mok/Legends|Cho mok]]'' **''[[Sai cha/Legends|Sai cha]]'' **''[[Sai tok/Legends|Sai tok]]'' **''[[Mou kei/Legends|Mou kei]]'' *'''Lightsaber Combat Through the Star Wars Saga''' **[[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']] **[[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']] **[[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Return of the Jedi'']] **[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''The Phantom Menace'']] **[[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Attack of the Clones'']] **[[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Revenge of the Sith'']] *'''Other Information''' **The Power of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] (concerning [[Synthetic lightsaber crystal/Legends|Sith crystal]]) **[[Yoda/Legends|Yoda's]] Legacy (concerning the importance of open-mindedness) **[[Dun Möch/Legends|Dun Möch]] ==Media== ===Collected in=== *[[Star Wars Insider 62|''Star Wars Insider'' 62]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Fightsaber: Jedi Lightsaber Combat |pl=Fightsaber: Jedi Lightsaber Combat |tr=Fightsaber: Jedi Lightsaber Combat }} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Star Wars Insider 62 articles]]
